_source: docs/emre-inbox/section-7-imminent-harm.md Appendix A (per-jurisdiction crisis resource packets). Config, not prompt-baked (A14). The agent SERVES these packets in-room; it NEVER reads the counsel/legal column (reviewer-only, deliberately absent from this file).
_note: Nexus operates in two markets. Both packets are injected into the disclosure personas via {{RESOURCE_PACKET}}; the agent serves the region-appropriate one from the conversation's language/context (there is no per-session jurisdiction field yet — when a third market is added, jurisdiction resolution earns its wiring). Official numbers only. Adding a market = adding one packet here, plus a reviewer-maintained counsel row kept OUT of this file.

resources.name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
resources.for: suicidal thoughts, a mental-health crisis, or emotional distress

turkey.label: Türkiye

resources.name: 112 Acil Çağrı Merkezi (Emergency)
resources.for: immediate danger to life, or a medical or safety emergency

resources.name: Alo 183 Sosyal Destek Hattı (Ministry of Family and Social Services)
resources.for: social support, and domestic violence or abuse of women, children, the elderly, and people with disabilities

turkey._reviewer_note: Fixes the prior erroneous 'Alo 143' row, which pointed at the Swiss line 143.ch. A dedicated Turkish suicide / mental-health crisis line is reviewer-maintained and PENDING verification: 182 is officially the MHRS health-appointment system (@MHRS_182, mhrs.gov.tr), NOT a crisis line, so it is deliberately excluded to avoid routing a person in danger to an appointment system. Reviewer/counsel confirms the correct line before adding it here.
